title: viburnum ferrugineum
intro: Viburnum ferrugineum, also known as Rusty-buckthorn, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. Traditionally, Viburnum ferrugineum has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain. The plant is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Viburnum ferrugineum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
